description: internal:rule= on a NON-composite state-child (§51.0.O). <Idle> is a simple state-child with no nested <engine> in its body, so there is no inner engine to preserve — the internal/external distinction is meaningless. internal:rule= is legal ONLY on a composite state-child, so E-INTERNAL-RULE-NOT-COMPOSITE fires (the §34 error partition).
rationale: §51.0.O internal:rule= is legal ONLY on a composite state-child (one with a nested <engine> body); otherwise E-INTERNAL-RULE-NOT-COMPOSITE.
